Records.authors: Winterhalder, R., Magerya, V., Villa, E., Jones, S.P., Kerner, M., Butter, A., Heinrich, G., Plehn, T.
Records.description: Two-loop planar double box (ladder) integral with massive internal propagators, occurring in ttV production at two loops. Seven propagators: five massive (mass $m$) and two massless rungs. Four external legs: $p_1, p_2$ massless; $p_3$ on-shell with mass $m$; $p_4$ off-shell. Close to 2-loop gluon ladder with Coulomb singularity. Anticipated to contain elliptic functions. Has 6 Feynman parameters. Used as benchmark for neural network contour deformation optimization.
